Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x04E0 "MADSCIENTIST-6500-04E0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $6500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mad Scientist.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $6500 which:
1. turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. copies 256 bytes of data from $6530 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 3. sets the values $03, $02 and $07 at the end of colour RAM ($DBFD-$DBFF) to avoid a protection routine at $34E8 from crashing the game
Note: the breakpoint to use for dumping is $0C7F, but using the start address of $04E0 allows some setup code to run which was executed in the original before the game had finished loading.
